channel.title: Abstract Voyage
channel.description: Manuel Cerdas is a creative engineer and consultant working across AI engineering, product strategy, systems thinking, and expressive web interfaces.

item.title: Introducing Infinity Labs: The Open Education Initiative
item.description: Announces Infinity Labs, a free open education initiative offering software engineering learning resources and videos.

item.title: The implementation of biomimetics in the design and development of highly efficient user interfaces
item.description: Looks at biomimetics in UI design and how nature-inspired patterns can improve interface efficiency and usability.

item.title: The resilient team, the Tech Lead role and the coordination function in Scrum
item.description: Explores how tech leads build resilient teams in Scrum and coordinate effectively across roles and responsibilities.

item.title: A retrospective to my first 5 years leading people
item.description: A retrospective on five years of technical leadership, covering people management, decision-making, and career growth.

item.title: The taxonomy of dependencies in software and their associated risk
item.description: Analyzes dependency types in software engineering and the risk tradeoffs they introduce across systems and teams.

item.title: Real-Time Feature Toggles with React and LaunchDarkly
item.description: Walkthrough of real-time feature flags in React using LaunchDarkly to manage releases safely and continuously.

item.title: The importance of tackling technical debt
item.description: Explains what technical debt is, why it accumulates, and how teams can manage it to keep software maintainable.

item.title: Understanding the Document Object Model (DOM)
item.description: Introduces the Document Object Model (DOM), explaining how web pages are structured and how JavaScript interacts with nodes and events.

item.title: Gzipping vs minification
item.description: Explains the difference between gzip compression and minification and how both improve web performance and bandwidth usage.

item.title: Mastering the SOLID principles
item.description: A practical guide to the SOLID principles in object-oriented programming and how they improve maintainable software architecture.

item.title: Thinking in systems.
item.description: A journal by Manuel Cerdas. Engineer & consultant. Formerly McKinsey. On systems and craft.
